text: Being here, surrounded by the otherworldly lighting and the cryptic visual language of innovation and research, I feel both isolated and drawn into a liminal space. The luminous purple glow ahead tempts me to cross the boundary between the ordinary and the experimental. I feel contemplative, sensing the air of anticipation and potential that infuses the quiet environment. The atmosphere is at once artificial and strangely magnetic—curiosity pulls me deeper, yet I remain a watchful observer, aware of how easily one can become part of the enigma rather than simply witness it.
